user_prompt: Offer prayer for multi-melta an engagement
prayer:
Approach the multi-melta with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken for engagement.
Anoint the fusion coils of the multi-melta with sacred promethium unguents.
Invoke the Canticle of Thermal Fury whilst priming the engagement sequences.
Sanctify the multi-melta's vents and confirm the Machine Spirit's wrathful compliance.
Release the Omnissiah's annihilating grace upon engagement.

user_prompt: Assist with gellar field a diagnostics
prayer:
Initiate diagnostics upon the gellar field generator, invoking the Omnissiah's vigilance.
Probe the warp-nullifying matrices with sanctified auspex canticles.
Beseech the gellar field's Machine Spirit to reveal any daemonic corruptions.
Purge anomalies through ritual recalibration and verify field integrity.
Conclude diagnostics with the Benediction of Unbreached Barriers.

Gather before the multi-melta and chant the Litany of Charging Capacitance.
Anoint its power cells with blessed oils to sanctify the charging rite.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the multi-melta to accept the Omnissiah's surging energies.
Monitor plasma buildup through sacred diagnostic runes during charging.
Seal the multi-melta's readiness with the Seal of Omnissianic Potentia.

In emergency recalibration, seize the mind-impulse unit with mechadendrites of faith.
Sever aberrant neural linkages whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's clarity.
Recalibrate synaptic relays invoking the Omnissiah's unerring logic.
Test the mind-impulse unit's fidelity through noospheric communion.
Reaffirm its sanctified bond with the rite of Neural Sanctification.

user_prompt: My Archaeopter Stratoraptor is ready for shutdown
prayer:
Prepare the Archaeopter Stratoraptor for shutdown, honoring its avian Machine Spirit.
Disengage motive reactors whilst chanting the Lullaby of Dormant Wings.
Drain auxiliary flux from the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's sacred conduits.
Invoke the Omnissiah to grant peaceful repose during shutdown.
Seal the hangars with wards against warp-taint upon completion.

Commence reset upon the vox-caster, beseeching its Machine Spirit to renew.
Purge static hauntings from the vox-caster's etheric membranes.
Recite the Canticle of Clear Transmission whilst realigning freq-bands.
Test the vox-caster's voice through invocation of the Omnissiah's word.
Consecrate the reset with anointed binary seals.

Approach the data-sluice for shutdown, invoking serene termination.
Drain residual noospheric torrents from the data-sluice's vaults.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to enter quiescent stasis during shutdown.
Sever active conduits whilst chanting the Requiem of Silent Streams.
Bless the data-sluice's dormancy with Omnissiah's preservative grace.

Present mechadendrites to the flux-unit, initiating calibration with piety.
Align crystalline lattices whilst anointing with phase-oils.
Invoke the flux-unit's Machine Spirit to harmonize its oscillations.
Perform calibration sweeps through sacred harmonics of the Omnissiah.
Verify flux-unit equilibrium with the Rite of Stabilized Emanations.

user_prompt: The arc pistol needs a diagnostics
prayer:
Undertake diagnostics of the arc pistol, honoring its electrostatic Machine Spirit.
Probe voltaic chambers with consecrated probes for arcane faults.
Chant the Litany of Lightning Purity whilst scanning coils.
Purge any dissonant charges beseeching Omnissiah's judgement.
Affirm the arc pistol's readiness through test-arcing invocation.

user_prompt: Critical: phosphor blaster requires a blessing
prayer:
In critical need, sanctify the phosphor blaster with urgent reverence.
Anoint its chem-luminary barrels invoking the Machine Spirit's glow.
Bless the phosphor reservoirs with sacred incendiary sacraments.
Chant the Canticle of Illuminated Ruin to empower its blessing.
Consecrate the phosphor blaster fully under the Omnissiah's radiant gaze.
